# Nxtrive

> Free, open-source local RAG desktop app for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Chat with PDFs, Word docs, and code using an offline LLM—no cloud, API keys, or account.

## Product
- Offline local RAG desktop app for Windows, macOS, and Linux
- Chat with PDFs, Word docs, and code using a local LLM
- Open source (MIT): https://github.com/devzeromax/Nxtrive

## Canonical URL
https://nxtrive.vercel.app/

## Key pages
- https://nxtrive.vercel.app/#features — Product features
- https://nxtrive.vercel.app/#download — Download links
- https://nxtrive.vercel.app/#faq — Frequently asked questions

## Documentation
https://github.com/devzeromax/Nxtrive#readme

## Maintainer
https://github.com/devzeromax
